title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE CRUZ ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY CRUZ, MUNICIPALITY OF BUENAVISTA, PROVINCE OF BOHOL, TO POLICARPO TIROL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 13058

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6707, February 10, 1989 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE CRUZ ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY CRUZ, MUNICIPALITY OF BUENAVISTA, PROVINCE OF BOHOL, TO POLICARPO TIROL ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Cruz Elementary School in Barangay Cruz, Municipality of Buenavista, Province of Bohol, shall hereafter be known as the Policarpo Tirol Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.) JOVITO R. SALONGA

(Sgd.) RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on September 26, 1988 and December 2, 1988, respectively.

(Sgd.) EDWIN P. ACOBA

(Sgd.) QUIRINO D. ABAD SANTOS, JR.

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary of the House of

Representatives

Approved: Enacted without executive approval, February 10, 1989

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
